property.name: singleSiteOnHoldMessage
property.label: Message for single site on hold
property.description: Displayed when only one site is marked as on hold out of the user's available sites
property.default: {0} currently has a credit status of 'on hold'. Please contact your Blue Arrow consultant to resolve this issue.

property.name: allSitesSelectedOnHoldMessage
property.label: Message for all sites is selected and more than one site is on hold
property.description: Displayed when all sites is selected and more than one site is marked as on hold out of the user's available sites
property.default: More than one of your assigned sites currently have a credit status of 'on hold'. Please contact your Blue Arrow consultant to resolve this issue.

property.name: selectedSiteOnHoldMessage
property.label: Message for selected site marked on hold
property.description: Displayed when the selected site is marked as on hold
property.default: Your currently selected site has a credit status of 'on hold'. Please contact your Blue Arrow consultant to resolve this issue.
